title: Supply Chain Manager - TNT India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - TNT India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at TNT India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About TNT India:
TNT India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TNT India!
